title: AWF Model Selection Policy
description: Declarative model-selection policy for agentic workflows. Consumed by the gh-aw compiler (serialised into lock files) and enforced by AWF at container startup.

$schema.description: URI of the JSON Schema that validates this document.

version.description: Policy schema version. MUST be the string "1".

model.description: Primary model to request. AWF attempts this model first.

fallback.description: Ordered fallback chain tried when the primary model is unavailable. Evaluated left to right. A "{ strategy: auto }" sentinel causes AWF to select the best available model satisfying the active constraints.

constraints.description: Constraints applied to every candidate in the resolution chain (primary and all fallbacks). A candidate that fails any constraint is skipped.

on_unavailable.description: Behaviour when no model in the chain satisfies all constraints. "fail" (default) aborts with a non-zero exit code. "warn-and-use-best" logs a warning and uses the highest-ranked available model regardless of constraints. "queue" is reserved for future runtime queuing support.

reasoningEffort.description: Engine-specific reasoning effort hint. Only applicable to models that support a reasoning-effort parameter.

modelCapability.description: A discrete capability that a model may or may not support.

costTier.description: Billing tier bucket used to constrain model selection by cost.

modelSpec.description: Identifies a specific model to use.

id.description: Model identifier as understood by the provider (e.g., "gpt-5.2", "claude-sonnet-4-20250514").

autoStrategy.description: Sentinel entry that instructs AWF to select the best available model satisfying the active constraints.

fallbackEntry.description: One entry in the fallback chain: either a concrete model specification or the "auto" sentinel.

modelConstraints.description: Constraints that every candidate in the resolution chain must satisfy.

capabilities.description: Set of capabilities the resolved model MUST support. An empty array imposes no capability constraint.

max_context_window.description: Maximum context-window size (in tokens) the resolved model may have. null means no upper bound.

min_context_window.description: Minimum context-window size (in tokens) the resolved model must provide.

cost_tier.description: The resolved model's cost tier MUST equal this value.

modelPolicyAudit.description: Controls which model-selection events are written to the audit log.

log_selection.description: When true, AWF emits an audit-log entry recording which model was selected and the resolution source (primary | fallback | auto).

log_fallback_reason.description: When true, AWF emits an audit-log entry explaining why the primary (or each preceding fallback) was skipped.
